features: REUSABLE & SUSTAINABLE: Zero waste & plant-based floss. 2 Month Supply
FREE FROM ADDITIVES: Fluoride coated for added anti-cavity effect. Minty fresh and waxed using all-natural ingredients

HOW TO USE: Cut off 45cm of floss and wind around 1 finger of each hand. Hold the floss tight between your thumbs and forefingers, leaving about 2.5cm of floss between them, no slack! Use a gentle rocking movement to guide the floss between your teeth.
description: From the brand Previous page Why would I use a tablet to brush my teeth? Did you know that 20 billion tubes of toothpaste go to land or into the ocean each year, let alone all the palm oil packed inside them – PÄRLA is the solution to this never-ending story of destruction What makes PÄRLA diﬀerent? The founders have a background with years of experience in the dental industry. Their combined expertise has gone into creating toothpaste unlike any other on the market. Can they whiten teeth? Our PÄRLA PRO tabs give you sparkly white teeth in no time. Hydroxyapatite is the key ingredient for adding a high-gloss, whitening shine. Next page
